hooks.commandWindows: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$e='SessionStart';$raw=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd();$p=$null;try{if($raw){$p=$raw|ConvertFrom-Json -ErrorAction Stop}}catch{};$starts=@();if($p -and $p.PSObject.Properties['cwd']){$starts+=[string]$p.PSObject.Properties['cwd'].Value};$starts+=(Get-Location).Path;$launcher=$null;foreach($start in $starts){try{$dir=(Resolve-Path -LiteralPath $start -ErrorAction Stop).Path}catch{continue};if(Test-Path -LiteralPath $dir -PathType Leaf){$dir=Split-Path -Parent $dir};while($dir){$candidate=Join-Path $dir '.codex/hooks/team-native-launcher.ps1';if(Test-Path -LiteralPath $candidate -PathType Leaf){$launcher=$candidate;break};$parent=Split-Path -Parent $dir;if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($parent)-or $parent -eq $dir){break};$dir=$parent};if($launcher){break}};if($launcher){$raw | & pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $launcher -HookEvent $e}else{[ordered]@{systemMessage='Codex hook launcher was not found';hookSpecificOutput=[ordered]@{hookEventName=$e;additionalContext='Codex hook launcher was not found; advisory/reminder only.'}}|ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 -Compress};exit 0"
